name: mcp-server-neo4j-aura
description: Managing Neo4j Aura database instances through the Neo4j Aura API.

rating.reason: Tool names are clear and specific, indicating their purpose well. However, descriptions are consistently minimal (1 sentence each) and lack important context about usage scenarios, limitations, or what information is returned. Parameter descriptions are basic but adequate, with the create_instance tool showing better parameter documentation. The toolset provides functional guidance but leaves users with questions about when to use specific tools and what to expect from them.
